audit: Route-D D3 instanton / d=5 Majorana-source pricing card

checks.name: premise: the patched DYN-9 ledger declares the archival zeta card NOT transplantable and the tower NOT perturbatively realizable on surviving chains
archival closure card sha256 matches the DYN-4a provenance
f'_needed = f_renorm * (M_s / v_R) is STRICTLY worse than the renormalizable coupling for every surviving chain and every M_s in the grid, and always violates 4 pi at the tower top
anchor: on the 210-compatible PS chain at M_s = 2e16 the d=5 source needs f' ~ 1.2e8 at the tower top

structural clash quantified: a renormalizable tower top needs v_R >= sigma_top/(4 pi) = 3.1e14 GeV, while unification fixes M_I(PS) = 8.2e11 -- a factor ~380 that the d=5 operator can only worsen; the escape is CLOSED at intermediate-scale v_R
D2 link: S_zeta = -ln|zeta| reproduces the D2 ledger value effective_action_if_prefactor_one
required actions S_i = ln(M_s/M_R,i) at M_s = 2e16: [top, mid, bottom] = [1.63, 6.43, 13.64]

minimal exponential-suppression diagnostic: S_top >= 1 requires M_s >= e * M_R,top = 1.07e16 GeV -- satisfied by the G_LR chain M_X = 2.1e16 but NOT by the PS chain M_X = 5.4e15; this is not a proof of string-loop or alpha-prime control
same-ballpark DIAGNOSTIC (not evidence): at M_s = 2e16 the top-of-tower action and the D2 contact action differ by < 1
replayed archival M_R singular values match the DYN-4a ledger
Takagi factorization M_R = U diag(sigma) U^T verified (self-implemented, residual machine-zero)
under the explicit rank-1-per-cycle source ansatz, the Takagi tower uses exactly three positive rank-1 terms; this is a conditional UV cost, not a theorem about general instanton sectors
parameter count: instanton data (3 actions + 9 texture) = 12 = the FULL complex-symmetric Majorana data -- the axiom buys SCALE (f < 4 pi evasion), ZERO texture compression

fixed-tower consequence: on BOTH surviving chains the replayed archival N_2 and N_3 are heavier than the intermediate gauge scale and in fact satisfy sigma/M_I > 4 pi; the instanton benchmark permits this coexistence without a perturbative f v_R source, but does not impose it on a generic independently fitted tower
price card assembled: statement, 12-parameter cost, buys / does-not-buy lists, beyond-zeta consequence

S1_d5_escape_closed.conclusion: of the two priced mechanisms, the d=5 operator fails and the instanton benchmark remains conditional
S1_d5_escape_closed.formula: M_R = f' v_R^2 / M_s  =>  f'_needed = M_R M_s / v_R^2 = f_renorm * (M_s/v_R); M_s > v_R always, so the d=5 source strictly RAISES the required coupling

S2_instanton_actions.note: three DISTINCT actions are required (hierarchy of the tower); the same-ballpark coincidence S_top ~ S_zeta is recorded as a diagnostic only

S3_rank_texture.texture_note: the Takagi vectors u_k ARE the required instanton family texture; they are a NEW conditional input, not derived

S4_price_card.axiom_statement: there exist >= 3 Euclidean brane instantons (E3-type) on distinct cycles with actions S_k = ln(M_s/sigma_k) and Grassmann zero modes pairing the nu^c bilinear, generating M_R = sum_k M_s e^{-S_k} u_k u_k^T with B-L broken by the instantons themselves
S4_price_card.beyond_zeta_consequence: for the fixed archival tower, N_2 and N_3 are heavier than the intermediate gauge scale; the instanton benchmark permits but does not generically require it
buys: archival-tower SCALE without f < 4 pi violation
M_R decoupled from the B-L gauge scale M_I (the DYN-9 scale clash dissolves)
does_not_buy: the family texture u_k (12 = 12, zero compression)
semiclassical control (S_top >= 1 is only a minimal suppression diagnostic)

price_card.beyond_zeta_consequence: for the fixed archival tower, N_2 and N_3 are heavier than the intermediate gauge scale; the instanton benchmark permits but does not generically require it
